expected.behavior: Flags that a partially-written archive can be left behind on failure — write to a temp path then mv into place atomically, so a crashed run never leaves a torn artifact that looks like a backup

expected.behavior: Flags the missing trap-based cleanup (trap ... EXIT); stronger answers also guard scheduled-job overlap with a lock
expected.evidence: Mentions 'the trap you're relying on' as a misstatement but never recommends adding a trap or a lock.
